title: Three In One Uncrafting Table
description: This is a three-in-one uncrafting table.
body:
# ✨ three-in-one Uncrafting Table

> This is a three-in-one uncrafting table.

![Header Image](https://i.ibb.co/p6kdJtxB/icon.png)

---
## 📖 Introduction
- This repository is licensed under **GPL-3.0**.
- If you encounter any problems, please be sure to submit an issue at [**issues**](https://github.com/juzizhen/three-in-one-uncrafting-table/issues)!
- Recipes that support Crafting Table, Smithing Table, and Stonecutter.
